title: Stale's Revamped Deserts
description: Tired of bland deserts? Want more spice and pizzaz to 'em? That's not a problemo with this mod.
body:
![LOGO2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df59c79c20ec6107b482c5109fa75dc167b78d68.png)
____________________________________________________________________________________________


A Desert Expansion That Won't Disapoint
A whole new biome is just a click or two away, what are you waiting for?
***See Gallery For The Mod Contents.***

![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7f44a095f5227ab02df3b329d83be850a4f2b7f.png)

This is my first ever mod, from the beggining of this serval day journey I knew I wanted to expand and improve the vast emptiness of Minecraft's deserts. I had no clue how to mod from the begining but just watched where the mod would take me.

## Aditional Information
This mod requires GekoLib 4.0 or higher / Forge 1.20.1 to operate.
[https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
The Music Disc was created and composed by:
https://www.youtube.com/@LostAngelYT
